results.owner_or_reason: Not a coverage-index key literally, but hard-check match: breakdown/extension/plan.json E3-S1 '[extension] Delivery-adapter framework — provider registry + own-compose-surface injection port' (covers FR-D1, FR-D5) implements AD-EXT-1's exact rule (one DeliveryAdapter interface behind a single provider registry) under the older FR-D id.

No story anywhere implements 'tier is data, never code' — the versioned signed-remote-JSON GO/DEGRADE config channel with sole-authority precedence over the AD-EXT-1 registry. extension/plan.json E3-S4 hardcodes Claude/Grok as a static posture (not a data-driven config flip); E5-S2 versions selector fixtures for breakage repair only, not the tier field or its precedence rule. Zero hits for tier-config/signed-JSON/GO-DEGRADE concepts in feature-map.txt or any breakdown/*/plan.json 'covers'. Also absent from the gap-hunt/ext-sweep tickets (which covered AD-EXT-3/4/5/6/7 but not this one). Genuine gap — predates the addendum architecture that introduced tier-as-remote-config; not OQ-deferred or superseded.
Key in coverage-index.json -> ["extsweep"]. Corresponds to gap-hunt/ext-sweep/architecture.json's 'Shape 1a compose-VALIDATION + outcome-report' ticket (token reserve-then-spend, audit SoR).

Key in coverage-index.json -> ["extsweep"]. Server-authoritative scope re-resolution + audit-SoR closed by the identity Shape 2 mint-tightening ticket in gap-hunt/ext-sweep/architecture.json.
Key in coverage-index.json -> ["extsweep"]. Read-your-writes-on-audit acceptance criterion (AC7) explicitly threaded through the Shape 1a ticket in gap-hunt/ext-sweep/architecture.json.

Genuine gap.

Not a coverage-index key literally, but hard-check match: breakdown/extension/plan.json E1-S1 '[extension] MV3 scaffold — manifest v3 service worker + popup shell, env-only config, build + CI' (covers AD-5a) literally implements AD-EXT-9's rule (env-injected backend URLs, no baked default) via its 'env-only config' scope.
